meta.name: The Shattered Isles
meta.description: A chain of volcanic islands scattered across an emerald sea, each hiding ancient secrets and warring tribes.

islands.name: Verdant Isle
islands.description: A lush tropical island covered in dense jungle. The largest of the Shattered Isles.

islands.name: Coral Atoll
islands.description: A ring of coral formations surrounding a shallow lagoon. Sea creatures and traders gather here.

islands.name: Obsidian Peaks
islands.description: Jagged volcanic mountains still smoking with geothermal activity. Rich in rare minerals.

islands.name: Mistwood Isle
islands.description: A fog-shrouded island of ancient twisted trees. Strange whispers echo through the mist.

islands.name: Sun Reef
islands.description: Shallow sun-bleached coral platforms that form natural bridges between islands.

islands.name: Skyspire Island
islands.description: A solitary peak rising impossibly high, its summit often hidden in clouds. The ancients built a temple at its peak.

islands.name: Tide Flats
islands.description: Vast shallow salt flats that appear and disappear with the tides. Treacherous but rich in shellfish.

islands.name: Ember Chain
islands.description: A series of small volcanic islets connected by lava bridges. Home to fire tribes.

locations.name: Driftwood Beach
locations.description: A serene beach littered with weathered driftwood and sea glass. The gentle waves bring treasures from distant lands.

locations.name: Jungle Path
locations.description: A narrow winding trail through dense tropical foliage. Colorful birds call from the canopy above.

locations.name: Village of Tides
locations.description: A bustling village built on stilts over the shallows. The Tide Tribe trades fish and pearls here.

locations.name: Elder Kai's Hut
locations.description: A large wooden hut decorated with shells and bones. Smoke rises from incense burners within.

locations.name: Market Square
locations.description: A lively open-air market where merchants hawk wares from across the isles. You can trade resources here.

locations.name: Verdant Harbor
locations.description: Small wooden docks where fishing boats and rafts are moored. Some brave sailors offer passage between islands.

locations.name: Ancient Ruins
locations.description: Crumbling stone pillars and overgrown temples from a forgotten civilization. Strange glyphs glow faintly at night.

locations.name: Hidden Cave
locations.description: A concealed cave behind a waterfall. Inside, pools of luminescent water cast an eerie blue glow.

locations.name: Fishing Cove
locations.description: A sheltered cove with calm clear water. Schools of fish dart through coral below.

locations.name: Coral Clearing
locations.description: A natural clearing formed by massive brain corals. Crystal-clear tidal pools teem with colorful life.

locations.name: Lagoon Village
locations.description: The Coral Tribe's underwater-adjacent settlement. Homes are half-submerged and decorated with living coral.

locations.name: Coral Throne
locations.description: A magnificent throne carved from a single giant coral formation. Chief Maren holds court here.

locations.name: Deep Pools
locations.description: Dark bottomless pools where strange creatures lurk. The coral tribe avoids this place after dark.

locations.name: Reef Bridge North
locations.description: A natural coral bridge connecting the Coral Atoll to the Sun Reef. Treacherous when waves are high.

locations.name: Sun Platform
locations.description: A flat, sun-bleached coral platform perfect for resting. Warm sea breezes carry the scent of salt.

locations.name: Ember Crossing
locations.description: Where the cool reef meets the hot volcanic rock. Steam rises where waves hit lava stone.

locations.name: Fire Tribe Camp
locations.description: A fortified encampment built from volcanic rock. The Fire Tribe forges weapons in natural lava flows.

locations.name: Hilda's Forge
locations.description: A massive open-air forge using natural lava channels as furnaces. The heat is nearly unbearable.

locations.name: Lava Bridge
locations.description: A narrow bridge of cooled lava connecting to the Obsidian Peaks. Glowing cracks hint at the molten river below.

locations.name: Sulfur Springs
locations.description: Bubbling hot springs with medicinal properties. The air is thick with sulfurous steam.

locations.name: Obsidian Mine
locations.description: Deep tunnels carved into volcanic glass. Precious minerals glitter in torchlight.

locations.name: Peak Trail
locations.description: A dangerous winding path up the main volcanic peak. The view expands with every step.

locations.name: Volcano Summit
locations.description: The burning heart of Obsidian Peaks. A lava lake churns below, and the heat distorts the air.

locations.name: Ashen Shore
locations.description: A black sand beach on the edge of Obsidian Peaks. Ash falls like snow from the smoking mountain.

locations.name: Misty Grove
locations.description: An ancient grove where twisted trees form natural archways. Bioluminescent fungi light the way.

locations.name: Whispering Path
locations.description: A fog-covered trail where voices seem to emerge from the trees themselves. Don't follow them off the path.

locations.name: Spirit Village
locations.description: The Spirit Tribe lives in harmony with the forest spirits. Their homes grow organically from living trees.

locations.name: The Elder Tree
locations.description: A colossal tree at the heart of the Spirit Village. It is said to be thousands of years old and sentient.

locations.name: Moon Lake
locations.description: A perfectly still lake that reflects the moon even during the day. Its waters have healing properties.

locations.name: Witch Hollow
locations.description: A dark depression in the forest where an exiled witch brews potions from exotic ingredients.

locations.name: Tide Crossing
locations.description: A treacherous path of exposed seabed connecting multiple islands. Passable at low tide, with a sea channel leading to Mistwood Isle's Moon Lake.

locations.name: Salt Fields
locations.description: Vast expanses of crystallized salt that crunch underfoot. Mirages dance on the horizon.

locations.name: Trader's Rest
locations.description: A waystation built on wooden platforms above the salt flats. Traveling merchants rest here between islands.

locations.name: Skyspire Approach
locations.description: The base of the impossibly tall Skyspire mountain. Ancient carved steps spiral upward into the clouds.

locations.name: Cloud Stairway
locations.description: Ancient stone steps disappearing into the clouds. The wind howls and the air grows thin.

locations.name: Sky Temple
locations.description: An ancient temple at the peak of Skyspire. The clouds part here, revealing a breathtaking view of all the Shattered Isles.

elder_kai.name: Elder Kai
elder_kai.profileMarkdown:
# Elder Kai

**Role:** Tribal Elder of the Tide Tribe

**Appearance:** An ancient weathered fisherman with sun-darkened skin, a long white beard braided with shells, and deep knowing eyes.

### Personality
- Wise and patient, speaks in metaphors drawn from the sea
- Protective of the tribe, suspicious of outsiders until trust is earned
- Knows the history of the Shattered Isles

### Abilities
- **Tidal Wisdom**: Can read the tides and predict weather
- **Sea's Blessing**: Grants buffs to those who complete his tasks

### Inventory
- **Tide Staff**: A gnarled staff topped with a perfect pearl
- **Map Fragment**: Part of an ancient map of the Isles
- **Healing Kelp**: Restores 20 HP when consumed

merchant_lira.name: Merchant Lira
merchant_lira.profileMarkdown:
# Merchant Lira

**Role:** Traveling Merchant

**Appearance:** A sharp-eyed woman with colorful scarves and jingling jewelry. Her cart is overflowing with exotic goods.

### Personality
- Shrewd businesswoman who always seeks a deal
- Friendly but never gives anything for free
- Has connections across all the islands

### Trade Goods
| Item | Cost |
|:---|:---|
| Health Potion | 3 fish + 1 herb |
| Rope | 2 vine + 1 driftwood |
| Iron Dagger | 2 iron_ore + 1 obsidian_shard |
| Map Fragment | 5 pearl |

captain_rook.name: Captain Rook
captain_rook.profileMarkdown:
# Captain Rook

**Role:** Sea Captain & Ferry Service

**Appearance:** A muscular sailor with a parrot on his shoulder and a missing tooth that he's proud of.

### Personality
- Boisterous and loves telling tall tales
- Will transport players between island harbors
- Charges a fee in resources

### Services
- **Island Ferry**: Transport between harbors (costs 2 fish per trip)
- **Sea Stories**: Gives hints about hidden locations

hermit_zara.name: Hermit Zara
hermit_zara.profileMarkdown:
# Hermit Zara

**Role:** Cave-Dwelling Mystic

**Appearance:** A gaunt figure wrapped in glowing moss, with eyes that seem to see beyond the physical realm.

### Personality
- Speaks in riddles and cryptic prophecies
- Studies the ancient glyphs found in the ruins
- Will teach abilities to worthy adventurers

### Abilities
- **Glyph Reading**: Can decode ancient inscriptions
- **Crystal Scrying**: Can reveal hidden locations on the map

### Teaching
- Will teach the player a random ability if they bring 3 glyph_fragments

chief_maren.name: Chief Maren
chief_maren.profileMarkdown:
# Chief Maren

**Role:** Chief of the Coral Tribe

**Appearance:** A tall, regal woman with bioluminescent tattoos and armor made of living coral.

### Personality
- Stern but fair leader
- Concerned about the Deep Pools creatures growing bolder
- Respects strength and cunning

### Quest Line
1. Prove yourself by diving into the Deep Pools
2. Retrieve the stolen Coral Heart
3. Forge an alliance between the Coral and Tide tribes

coral_smith.name: Coral Smith
coral_smith.profileMarkdown:
# Coral Smith

**Role:** Weapon & Armor Crafter

**Appearance:** A quiet artisan whose hands are permanently stained with coral pigments.

### Crafting Recipes
| Item | Materials |
|:---|:---|
| Coral Blade | 3 coral + 1 deep_pearl |
| Reef Shield | 5 coral + 2 kelp |
| Pearl Amulet | 2 pearl + 1 crystal_shard |

warchief_kael.name: Warchief Kael
warchief_kael.profileMarkdown:
# Warchief Kael

**Role:** Warchief of the Fire Tribe

**Appearance:** A massive warrior covered in burn scars and tribal tattoos. His armor glows with embedded embers.

### Personality
- Values strength and combat prowess above all
- Will challenge visitors to prove their worth
- Secretly fears the volcanic wyrm at the summit

### Abilities
- **Ember Fist**: Devastating fire-enhanced melee attacks
- **War Cry**: Buffs all Fire Tribe warriors

### Quest Line
1. Defeat three of his warriors in combat
2. Retrieve obsidian from the mine
3. Slay the Volcanic Wyrm

forge_master_hilda.name: Forge Master Hilda
forge_master_hilda.profileMarkdown:
# Forge Master Hilda

**Role:** Master Blacksmith of the Fire Tribe

**Appearance:** A stout, soot-covered woman with arms like tree trunks and eyes that burn like coals.

### Crafting Recipes
| Item | Materials |
|:---|:---|
| Obsidian Sword | 3 obsidian + 2 iron_ore |
| Volcanic Armor | 5 obsidian + 1 fire_crystal |
| Ember Shield | 2 obsidian_shard + 3 iron_ore |

elder_yew.name: Elder Yew
elder_yew.profileMarkdown:
# Elder Yew

**Role:** Spiritual Leader of the Spirit Tribe

**Appearance:** An impossibly old figure who seems to be partially made of wood. Leaves grow from their hair.

### Personality
- Speaks slowly and deliberately
- Connected to the forest on a spiritual level
- Tasks visitors with restoring balance to the isle

### Abilities
- **Nature's Voice**: Can communicate with plants and animals
- **Root Walk**: Can teleport between ancient trees

spirit_weaver_linn.name: Spirit Weaver Linn
spirit_weaver_linn.profileMarkdown:
# Spirit Weaver Linn

**Role:** Enchantress & Crafter

**Appearance:** A young woman with flowers woven into her hair and fingers that trail luminescent threads.

### Crafting Recipes
| Item | Materials |
|:---|:---|
| Spirit Cloak | 3 spirit_moss + 2 dreamleaf |
| Moon Tonic | 1 moon_water + 2 moonberry |
| Glow Lantern | 2 glowshroom + 1 glowstone |

witch_morga.name: Witch Morga
witch_morga.profileMarkdown:
# Witch Morga

**Role:** Exiled Witch & Potion Brewer

**Appearance:** A hunched old woman with a cackling laugh and a cauldron that never stops bubbling.

### Personality
- Mischievous and unpredictable
- Exiled from the Spirit Tribe for forbidden experiments
- Will trade powerful potions for rare ingredients

### Potions
| Potion | Cost | Effect |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Berserker Brew | 3 glowshroom + 1 sulfur | +30 ATK, -20 DEF for 3 turns |
| Shadow Veil | 2 spirit_moss + 1 fog_lily | Invisibility for 1 turn |
| Giant's Strength | 1 ancient_bark + 2 moonberry | +50 STR for 2 turns |

wandering_merchant_ori.name: Wandering Merchant Ori
wandering_merchant_ori.profileMarkdown:
# Wandering Merchant Ori

**Role:** Traveling Merchant

**Appearance:** A mysteriously cloaked figure with a hovering backpack that seems to contain infinite items.

### Personality
- Never reveals their face
- Knows information about every island
- Prices are fair but non-negotiable

### Trade Goods
| Item | Cost |
|:---|:---|
| Map of the Isles | 5 sea_salt + 3 pearl |
| Climbing Gear | 4 rope + 2 iron_ore |
| Fire Resistance Potion | 2 sulfur + 1 moon_water |

temple_keeper_aeon.name: Temple Keeper Aeon
temple_keeper_aeon.profileMarkdown:
# Temple Keeper Aeon

**Role:** Guardian of the Sky Temple

**Appearance:** An ethereal being of light and wind, barely corporeal. Their voice echoes from everywhere at once.

### Personality
- Ancient beyond measure, remembers the world before the Shattering
- Speaks in profound truths
- Guards the final secret of the Shattered Isles

### Abilities
- **Wind Command**: Controls wind and weather across all islands
- **Time Glimpse**: Can show visions of past and future

### Quest
- The Final Quest: Collect artifacts from all four tribes to unlock the Temple's inner sanctum

jungle_spider.name: Jungle Spider
jungle_spider.description: A dog-sized spider with venomous fangs and camouflaged hide.

stone_guardian.name: Stone Guardian
stone_guardian.description: An animated stone statue from the ancient ruins. Slow but devastating.

cave_bat.name: Cave Bat
cave_bat.description: A large bat with glowing eyes that hunts in the dark.

abyssal_eel.name: Abyssal Eel
abyssal_eel.description: A monstrous electric eel from the deep pools. Shocks anything that comes near.

depth_lurker.name: Depth Lurker
depth_lurker.description: A tentacled horror from the ocean depths. Few survive an encounter.

lava_crab.name: Lava Crab
lava_crab.description: A crab with a shell of cooled lava. Its pincers glow red-hot.

fire_elemental.name: Fire Elemental
fire_elemental.description: A living flame that patrols the lava bridges. Immune to fire.

rock_golem.name: Rock Golem
rock_golem.description: A massive golem formed from volcanic rock. Guards the mine tunnels.

mine_spider.name: Mine Spider
mine_spider.description: A crystalline spider that spins webs of mineral thread.

mountain_drake.name: Mountain Drake
mountain_drake.description: A young dragon that nests on the volcanic peaks. Breathes superheated air.

volcanic_wyrm.name: Volcanic Wyrm
volcanic_wyrm.description: The apex predator of Obsidian Peaks. A colossal serpent of magma and stone.

shadow_wisp.name: Shadow Wisp
shadow_wisp.description: A flickering ball of dark energy that drains life force.

mist_wraith.name: Mist Wraith
mist_wraith.description: A ghostly figure that emerges from the fog. Its touch chills to the bone.

lake_serpent.name: Lake Serpent
lake_serpent.description: A long sinuous creature that lurks in Moon Lake's depths.

tide_crab.name: Tide Crab
tide_crab.description: A large crab that ambushes travelers on the tide crossings.

salt_scorpion.name: Salt Scorpion
salt_scorpion.description: A white scorpion perfectly camouflaged against the salt flats.

wind_elemental.name: Wind Elemental
wind_elemental.description: A swirling vortex of air that guards the Skyspire approach.

sky_hawk.name: Sky Hawk
sky_hawk.description: A massive raptor with razor talons that dives from above.
